findings.message: Provenance badge UI exists but is not attached to any child or parent surfaces, so the acceptance criterion for visible badges in real user flows is not met.

No runtime path populates `SceneNode.provenance` for AI-generated text, visual, or audio actions; current code only serializes/deserializes provenance when already present. This leaves project metadata provenance and audit linkage functionally incomplete.
`test_provenance_integration.gd` is not wired into any runner/CI path, so provenance badge and metadata behavior are not enforced by automated checks.
Badge copy is hardcoded in English (e.g., 'Human', 'AI (Text)', 'Source') and bypasses localization policy, conflicting with Polish-first UX requirements.
